content:
Title
* While the word "analyzation" exists, it's rarely used in everyday English. Consider using "analysis" instead.

Goal
* Please change
the frequency word_count of words that appear in the sentence at least twice
to:
each word that appears at least twice and its frequency [[word_count]]

* Consider formatting "at least twice" and "first appearance" in <<bold>> to draw players' attention to these key rules.

* The definition of what constitutes a word is missing. Consider adding something like:
Words are separated by a space.

Goal / Output
* The variable names [[words_count]] and [[word_count]] are very similar and can easily be confused. Consider renaming the latter to [[word_frequency]].

* Alternatively, consider simplifying the output format and remove the requirement to output [[words_count]].

Output
* Consider adding "or," before "if all".

* Please specify that there should be one line for each word/frequency pair.

Constraints
* Please add a constraint:
[[sentence]] does not contain any leading, trailing or consecutive spaces.

This ensures that no empty words (zero-length strings) can appear.

Cases
* Currently, single-letter words appear in Validator 3 only. Please either modify an existing test or add new pairs of cases to include single-letter words as well.

Single-word scenario (Constraints / Cases / Goal / Output)
* Please specify the lower bound of the length of [[sentence]]. If you plan to include cases where the sentence contains a single word, the lower bound should be 1. Otherwise, it should be 3.

* Under the current constraints, inputs containing only one word are possible. Please either:
  • add such cases, or
  • add a constraint stating that each [[sentence]] contains at least two words.

* If single-word cases are added, it may be more accurate to:
  • update the output phrase to "Only unique word(s)", and
  • replace "all words" (in the Goal and Output sections) with "all word(s)".

Thanks.
By which order should the words pe put out? By order of occurence? Alphabetically? By frequency?
